nasb.text: Saying, “God has forsaken him; Pursue and seize him, for there is no one to deliver.”

esv.text: and say, “God has forsaken him; pursue and seize him, for there is none to deliver him.”

cnv.text: 說：“　神已經離棄了他， 你們追趕他，拿住他吧！ 因為沒有人搭救他。”

ccb.text: “上帝已经丢弃了他。 去追赶、捉拿他吧， 因为无人会救他。”

csbs.text: 他们说：“神已经离弃了他。 追赶他，抓住他，因为没有人救他！”
